marketing.subtitle: Sell for cash or on a tab, track every customer's balance, and know who owes you without opening a notebook.
marketing.stepVenderDesc: Name, price, and stock. Just once.
marketing.stepFiadoDesc: Tap the product, pick cash or credit.
marketing.stepClientesDesc: Every customer's balance, always on hand.
marketing.ctaSubtitle: Every sale on credit gets recorded, with each customer's balance always on hand.

pricing.title: One simple plan for your store.
pricing.subtitle: Everything you need to sell and track tabs. The difference is how many employees you can add.
basicFeatures: Fiado with a per-customer credit limit

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Your store's status, at a glance.
overview.emptyDeudaDesc: Sales on credit will show up here with each customer's balance.

insightMessages.overCreditLimit: {cliente} went over their credit limit: owes {balance} (limit {limit}).

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.invoiceNote: Required for your invoice (factura): tax ID and legal name.
checkout.invalid: Check the document number and legal name.
checkout.noPlanDesc: Pick a plan on the pricing page to start checkout.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Electronic invoices (SIFEN) emitted for your team's payments.
invoices.emptyDesc: An invoice is emitted automatically after each payment.

productos.panelDesc: Your store's catalog: price and stock.
productos.emptyDesc: Add your first product with the form above.
productos.emptyAgotadosDesc: When a product hits 0 stock, it'll show up here.

clientes.panelDesc: Your store's customers and their tab balance.
clientes.emptyDesc: Add your first customer with the form above.
clientes.emptyConSaldoDesc: When a customer buys on credit, they'll show up here.

clienteDetail.emptyDesc: This customer's sales on credit and payments will show up here.

pos.title: New sale
pos.description: Tap a product to add it.
pos.clientRequiredHint: Pick a customer to sell on credit

ventas.title: Sales
ventas.emptyDesc: Register your first sale from "New sale".

notifications.overLimit: {cliente} is over their credit limit: owes {balance} (limit {limit}).

onboarding.workspaceSubtitle: This is how it'll show up in the app. You can change it anytime.
onboarding.localeSubtitle: Pick the language you want to use the app in.
onboarding.teamSubtitle: If someone helps you sell, invite them here. You can do this later.

auth.signUpSubtitle: Start with a username and a password.
auth.name: Name
auth.despensaSlugHelpSignUp: A short name for your store, no spaces. You'll use it together with your username to sign in.
auth.despensaSlugHelpSignIn: The short name you picked when you created the account.
auth.brandQuote: Ditch the notebook today: every sale on credit gets recorded, with each customer's balance always on hand.

errors.despensaRequired: Enter your store's name (letters, numbers and dashes, no spaces).
errors.despensaTaken: That store name is already taken. Try another one.

team.title: Staff
team.inviteCard: Create a login for an employee
team.adminOnlyInvite: You need to be an administrator to create new logins.
